languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

languages.text: "Ничего не могу сказать. Но предложил бы не торопиться с выводами".
"I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."
languages.original_text: "Ничего не могу сказать. Но предложил бы не торопиться с выводами".

traits.locale_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."
"I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."
"I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

languages.text: 「コメントはできません。でも、結論を急ぐ人はいないことをお勧めします」
languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

traits.locale_text: 「コメントはできません。でも、結論を急ぐ人はいないことをお勧めします」

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas en mesure de commenter cette déclaration, mais je vous suggère de ne pas tirer de conclusions hâtives. »
languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas en mesure de commenter cette déclaration, mais je vous suggère de ne pas tirer de conclusions hâtives. »

languages.text: "Dazu kann ich nichts sagen. Ich würde allerdings vorschlagen, keine voreiligen Schlüsse zu ziehen."
languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

traits.locale_text: "Dazu kann ich nichts sagen. Ich würde allerdings vorschlagen, keine voreiligen Schlüsse zu ziehen."

languages.text: "Yorum yapamam. Fakat kimsenin aceleci sonuçlara varmamasını öneririm."
languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

traits.locale_text: "Yorum yapamam. Fakat kimsenin aceleci sonuçlara varmamasını öneririm."

languages.text: «No tengo nada que comentar. Pero sugiero que nadie saque conclusiones precipitadas».
languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

traits.locale_text: «No tengo nada que comentar. Pero sugiero que nadie saque conclusiones precipitadas».

languages.text: “我无可奉告。但我建议任何人都不要妄下结论。”
languages.original_text: "I cannot comment. But I would suggest that no one jump to any conclusions."

traits.locale_text: “我无可奉告。但我建议任何人都不要妄下结论。”
